title: T-011 — inventory_allocations + pick_overrides schema + FEFO candidate query (11-shipping-c)
prompt:
# T-011 — Allocation schema + FEFO candidate query + pick_overrides

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §9.1 (inventory_allocations), §9.2 (pick_overrides), §6 D-SHP-1 LP-Based Allocation (ADR-001), §6 D-SHP-2 FEFO/FIFO Picking (ADR-005), §6 D-SHP-13 Quality Hold Soft Gate, §8.2 Flow Allocation, §11 V-SHIP-ALLOC-01..05
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce `inventory_allocations` + `pick_overrides` tables, write the canonical FEFO candidate query view + Postgres function consuming 05-WAREHOUSE `license_plates` table (LP availability + quality_holds + FEFO sort).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration creates:
   - `inventory_allocations` (org_id, sales_order_line_id FK CASCADE, license_plate_id FK references license_plates (05-WH T-002), quantity_allocated numeric(14,3) CHECK > 0, allocated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), allocated_by uuid NOT NULL, released_at timestamptz, release_reason text, R13)
   - `pick_overrides` (org_id, user_id, pick_list_line_id FK, license_plate_id FK, override_type text CHECK ('fefo_deviation','quality_hold','expired_lp'), hold_id uuid nullable references quality_holds (09-QA), reason_code text, notes text, overridden_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), audit_hash text NOT NULL — SHA-256 over override row; 7y retention BRCGS)
2. RLS + FORCE RLS via `app.current_org_id()` (T-125). UNIQUE(license_plate_id, sales_order_line_id) on inventory_allocations to prevent double-alloc.
3. View `v_fefo_lp_candidates` for a given product_id + qty + org_id: SELECT license_plates LEFT JOIN v_active_holds (09-QUALITY T-010) WHERE status='available' AND product_id=? AND org_id=app.current_org_id() ORDER BY expiry_date ASC NULLS LAST, qty_remaining DESC; returns rank, expiry_date, qty_remaining, location_id, hold_severity (NULL if no hold).
4. Postgres function `allocate_fefo(p_so_line_id uuid, p_qty numeric)` returns void; uses SELECT ... FOR UPDATE on candidate LPs to prevent race; INSERTs inventory_allocations rows; UPDATEs license_plates.status='reserved' and qty_remaining; honors V-SHIP-ALLOC-01 (sum <= qty_ordered - qty_picked), V-SHIP-ALLOC-04 (expired hard-block unless caller has override flag), V-SHIP-ALLOC-05 (FEFO sort).
5. The Postgres function operates under whatever org_id the calling session is set to via `app.set_org_context` (T-125) — never reads GUCs directly.
6. Drizzle schema in `packages/db/src/schema/shipping/allocations.ts`.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/00XX_shipping_allocations.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/shipping/allocations.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/shipping-allocations-fefo.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fresh DB and a SO line with quantity_ordered=100, and 3 LPs with expiry_date 2026-06-01/2026-05-15/2026-07-01 each qty=40, when allocate_fefo(so_line_id, 100) is called, then 2 inventory_allocations rows are created with LP rank order (2026-05-15 first, 2026-06-01 second), summing to 80 (LP fully consumed) + 1 partial of 20 from the third LP — FEFO sort respected (V-SHIP-ALLOC-05).
2. Given an LP with active critical quality_hold, when allocate_fefo runs and the LP is the FEFO winner, then it is skipped per D-SHP-13 hard gate (severity='critical') and the next LP is used. If only critical-hold LPs are available, function raises `shipping.fefo.qa_critical_hold_blocked`.
3. Given two concurrent allocate_fefo calls competing for the same LP, when run, then SELECT FOR UPDATE serializes them and only one allocation row is created (no over-allocation).
4. Given pg_policies inspected for inventory_allocations + pick_overrides, when listed, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() with no GUC reads.
5. Given INSERT into pick_overrides with audit_hash NULL, when constraint runs, then NOT NULL violation occurs.

## Test strategy
- RED: testcontainers Postgres 16 concurrency test (two parallel tx) asserting AC 1-5; seeds license_plates fixtures.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test shipping-allocations-fefo`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip SELECT FOR UPDATE — race condition would cause double-alloc (V-SHIP-ALLOC-02).
- Do not name business-scope column tenant_id.
- Do not read current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') in functions/views — use app.current_org_id().
- Do not bypass quality_hold gate (D-SHP-13) — query v_active_holds always.
- Do not omit FORCE RLS.
- Do not introduce ON DELETE CASCADE from license_plates to inventory_allocations — LP deletion must fail if allocations exist.

pipeline_inputs.description: inventory_allocations + pick_overrides schema + v_fefo_lp_candidates view + allocate_fefo() FOR UPDATE Postgres function honoring V-SHIP-ALLOC-* + D-SHP-13 hard gate.
pipeline_inputs.details: Cross-module reads license_plates (05-WH T-002) + v_active_holds (09-QA T-010). FEFO sort by expiry_date ASC NULLS LAST. SELECT FOR UPDATE prevents race. Critical-hold LPs skipped automatically per D-SHP-13.
out_of_scope: Do not implement Server Actions here (T-012).
Do not build allocation UI here (T-014).
Do not consume in confirmSO logic (T-007).
cross_module_dependencies: 01-npd/T-001 (product FG SSOT — variance_tolerance_pct + allergen attributes; coverage hygiene per R3 audit 2026-05-14)
09-quality/T-064 (consume gate — allocate_fefo must call holdsGuard before reserving LP; per 2026-05-14 audit)
acceptance_criteria: Given a SO line with qty_ordered=100 and 3 LPs with expiry 2026-06-01/2026-05-15/2026-07-01 each qty_on_hand=50, when allocate_fefo runs, then LP expiring 2026-05-15 is allocated first (FEFO) and v_active_holds gate (09-quality T-064) is checked before reservation.
Given an LP has active critical quality_hold, when allocate_fefo runs and that LP is the FEFO winner, then it is skipped and blocker_code='qa.critical_hold' returned (D-SHP-13).
Given two concurrent allocate_fefo calls competing for same LP, when run, then SELECT FOR UPDATE serializes them and no double-allocation occurs.

Given pg_policies inspected for inventory_allocations + pick_overrides, when listed, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() with no GUC reads; AND INSERT into pick_overrides with audit_hash NULL raises NOT NULL violation.
test_strategy: RED: testcontainers Postgres concurrency test (two parallel tx) asserting AC 1-5; license_plates fixtures.
Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test shipping-allocations-fefo`.
risk_red_lines: Do not skip SELECT FOR UPDATE.
Do not name business-scope column tenant_id.
Do not read current_setting GUCs in functions/views.
Do not allow ON DELETE CASCADE from license_plates to inventory_allocations.
Do not bypass the 09-quality consume gate (T-064 v_active_holds) — allocate_fefo must call holdsGuard(lpId, lotId) before reserving any LP.
